LeaderboardEntry.title: Leaderboard Entry
LeaderboardEntry.description: Represents a user's stats on the global leaderboard

level.description: The current level of the player

gold.description: The current gold (Mana) of the player

job.description: The current job of the player

rank.description: The current rank of the player

updatedAt.description: The last time the player's stats were serialized

/leaderboard/{playerId}.description: Firestore collection containing all players and their current stats for the global ranking
